list.vod_blurb: In an alternate present, genetically enhanced humans dominate society. Outcasts Leon and Chloe fight
list.vod_content: In an alternate present, genetically enhanced humans dominate society. Outcasts Leon and Chloe fight for justice against corrupt politicians exploiting genetic disparity, risking everything to challenge the oppressive system.
